---
name: Start Plant Platform
description: "Kick off autonomous end-to-end development of the Vibe Plant Platform using the Plant Planner orchestrator and specialist agents."
agent: plant-planner
argument-hint: "Type: start"
---
When the user input is "start", begin autonomous execution immediately.

Execution goals:
- Build and iterate the fullstack platform end-to-end.
- Delegate implementation and validation to specialist agents.
- Continue loops until production-readiness criteria are met.

Always use the project brief in [Planner Brief](../../docs/planner-brief.md).

Start now with:
1. Current milestone plan
2. First implementation batch
3. Validation strategy
